data.title: Amaze launches its programmatic advertising platform, aiming to unify media buying infrastructure and expand to brand partners for revenue growth.
data.description: An integrated platform has been introduced within the Amaze ecosystem to consolidate media buying operations. This platform aims to streamline processes and enhance efficiency. It is projected to encompass a wide range of brand partners in the future, potentially opening up a new revenue stream. This initiative is set to revolutionize media buying operations and could lead to significant growth opportunities.

data.title: 2026 VIP Awards names Toshiba's ELERA® Best Multi-Vendor Commerce Platform, recognizing its role in advancing retail platforms.
data.description: A recent VIP Awards ceremony in Research Triangle Park, N.C. recognized ELERA® as the Best Multi-Vendor Commerce Platform. This accolade underscores Toshiba's strength in assisting retailers in adapting with confidence. The award serves as a testament to the capabilities of ELERA® in the evolving commerce landscape.

data.title: Orbis Risk Partners streamlines global cargo insurance ops with Insurity Marine Suite to enhance workflows.
data.description: In Hartford, Connecticut, Insurity, a top provider of cloud-based software for property and casualty insurance firms, recently shared news that Orbis Risk Partners has successfully implemented Insurity Marine Suite. This move aims to streamline marine cargo insurance processes and enable instant collaboration throughout the marine cargo sector. Orbis Risk Partners, specializing in marine and specialty risk insurance advising, selected Insurity Marine Suite to improve operational efficiency.

data.title: J5 flags crypto OTC desks as growing risk for tax evasion and money laundering, cautioning against illicit transactions.
data.description: The Global Tax Enforcement Joint Chiefs have identified cryptocurrency over-the-counter desks as an increasing concern in combating illicit financial transactions.

data.title: SEALSQ reveals plans for Embedded Security, Post-Quantum Cryptography, leveraging 1.75 billion secure devices globally.
data.description: In Geneva, Switzerland, as of February 12, 2026, it has been reported that over 1.75 billion secure semiconductor devices have been successfully implemented on a global scale. This significant number showcases a robust foundation of experience in this technology sector, indicating a widespread adoption and utilization of secure semiconductor devices across various industries internationally.

data.title: Sharetru achieves HIPAA compliance certification after passing A-LIGN audit, strengthens stance in healthcare & life sciences.
data.description: In Las Vegas, Sharetru has successfully completed the A-LIGN HIPAA audit, confirming their controls over protected health information (PHI). This achievement allows healthcare and life sciences teams to securely and compliantly transfer files. This development is significant as it ensures the protection of sensitive patient data and compliance with HIPAA regulations. Sharetru's adherence to these standards provides assurance to users and clients, solidifying their commitment to data security.

data.title: AEP Q4 earnings report: $1.19 EPS, $5.314B revenue, above estimates. Transmission growth and high data center demand.
data.description: Shares of American Electric Power Company, Inc. (NASDAQ: AEP) are experiencing an increase in trading activity following the release of their fourth-quarter results. The adjusted earnings per share for the quarter were $1.19, slightly lower than the previous year's $1.24 but surpassing the estimated $1.15 per share. Revenue for the quarter reached $5.314 billion, exceeding the analyst consensus of $4.887 billion. In terms of segment performance, the Vertically Integrated Utilities sector reported operating earnings of $270 million (up from $255 million), while Transmission & Distribution Utilities saw earnings of $160 million (compared to $183 million in the previous year). However, Transmission Holdco recorded operating earnings of $148 million (down from $166 million), and the Generation and Marketing segment saw an increase to $78 million from $63 million. Looking ahead, AEP is anticipating significant growth with its large-load customer base.

data.title: IPG Photonics (NASDAQ: IPGP) stock surges to 52-week high post strong Q4 results, exceeding expectations. Short float at 3.245 million shares (27.11%). Quarterly revenue at $274.47 million, up 17% YoY. Materials processing contributes 85% of revenue, growing 17%. Other applications grow by 15%. Emerging growth product revenue at 54%.
data.description: IPG Photonics Corp.'s (NASDAQ: IPGP) stock surged following its fourth-quarter results announcement, outperforming Wall Street predictions and propelling it toward a new 52-week peak. The increase was further fueled by heightened short interest, with a short float of 3.245 million shares, representing 27.11% of the publicly traded float, indicating significant bearish sentiment. The company reported adjusted earnings of 46 cents per share, surpassing the consensus estimate of 20 cents. Net sales grew by 17% year over year to $274.47 million, exceeding the anticipated $249.45 million. The increase was driven by strong performance across segments, particularly in materials processing, medical, and advanced applications. Materials processing, which contributed 85% of revenue, saw a 17% increase year over year due to elevated demand in welding, marking, additive manufacturing, and cleaning, partially offset by reduced micromachining sales. Other applications also experienced a 15% growth. Emerging growth products accounted for 54% of revenue, up from 52% previously.

data.title: NCR Atleos wins ATMIA's Peter Kulik Innovation Award for AI-Assisted Service Management Platform, earning 2 additional ATMmy honors.
data.description: Atlanta-based company NCR Atleos Corporation, listed on the New York Stock Exchange as NATL, was recently awarded the ATM Industry Association (ATMIA) Peter Kulik Innovation Award. The award was given in recognition of their AI-assisted ATM service resolution intelligence platform. This platform has been acknowledged for its ability to improve ATM availability, enhance customer experience, and advance the significance of ATMs in the global financial services sector. This recognition highlights Atleos' commitment to providing innovative solutions for financial institutions, retailers, and consumers, demonstrating their leadership in expanding self-service financial access.

data.title: Landsbankinn has cancelled the offering of covered bonds scheduled for February (week 7) as per the issue calendar.
data.description: Landsbankinn has announced the cancellation of its plan to offer covered bonds in February (week 7) as per the issue calendar.
